rationale: Both reviews correctly approve with no findings, and both identify the same attributions in the diff: Dillies/Mrugała/Yunzhou Xie for the Mathlib convolution monoid and the Tau Ceti roadmap Layer 0. The only difference is Review 2 also names Yunzhou Xie, but this is a detail-level observation that doesn't change what the author would do — acting on either review leaves the PR identical.
